indiaVix.source: Upstox India VIX page — EOD June 29, 16:00 IST; confirmed by Moneycontrol India VIX page (13.61, +0.56, +4.29%)
indiaVix.note: Market-wide India VIX closed at 13.61 (+4.29%) on June 29. VIX rose on a down day — moderate fear uptick but still well within low-volatility zone (below 15). Applied to both NIFTY and SENSEX blocks as it is a market-wide index.

fnoVerdict.rationale: Futures OI, basis, and FII index-futures positioning are all unavailable from approved sources at this refresh, so a futures-side verdict cannot be grounded — held Neutral/Low pending approved NSE participant and futures-OI data.

optionsVerdict.rationale: EOD PCR 0.7644 (Upstox) shows call-writer dominance; Put wall 24,000 / Call wall 24,500 (Moneycontrol Trade Setup); India VIX rose +4.29% to 13.61 on a down day — a cautious/bearish options posture into the June 30 monthly expiry.

combinedVerdict.rationale: NIFTY closed below 24,000 (23,946.25) with a sub-0.80 PCR and a VIX uptick — options-side signals lean bearish into June 30 expiry. Futures-side data is DNA from approved sources, so confidence is capped at Medium.

fnoVerdict.rationale: SENSEX fell 372 pts (-0.48%) on June 29, moving in line with NIFTY. Futures basis and OI are DNA, limiting F&O read. PCR at 0.749 mirrors the bearish call-writer dominance seen in NIFTY, suggesting similar cautious positioning.

optionsVerdict.rationale: SENSEX PCR of 0.749 indicates call OI (128L) exceeds put OI (96L), reflecting bearish options positioning. Support/resistance strikes unavailable from static sources. VIX uptick on a down day adds mild caution. Confidence low due to DNA fields.

combinedVerdict.rationale: SENSEX closed at 76,728.37 (-0.48%), directionally aligned with NIFTY weakness. PCR below 0.8 confirms bearish options bias. Most F&O metrics are DNA for SENSEX; verdict extrapolated from spot decline and PCR alone. Low confidence due to thin sourced data.
